title: Great Canyon (Teyr)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Great Canyon''' was a natural canyon on the planet of [[Teyr/Legends|Teyr]].

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] set up a base near the Great Canyon, inside a landed [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|Lucrehulk-class battleship]].

[[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[K'Kruhk]] led his [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] into battle with the Separatists through the Great Canyon. Expecting an attack, the Confederacy set up an ambush, deploying [[OG-9 homing spider droid/Legends|OG-9 homing spider droids]] to decimate the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] battalion.

The remnants of K'Kruhk's force managed to reach the end of the canyon, and destroyed the battleship-base.
